title: Spicy Polish Paella Rice
description: A spicy and snappy Polish dish featuring paella rice, ideal for a quick weeknight meal.
instructions: Heat oil in a large paella pan or skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the sliced kielbasa and cook until browned, about 3 minutes.
Add the diced onion, bell pepper, and tomato to the pan, and cook until the vegetables are tender, about 5 minutes.
Add the minced garlic to the pan and cook for 1 minute, until fragrant.
Add the paprika, cayenne pepper, smoked paprika, salt, and black pepper to the pan, and stir to combine.
Add the paella rice to the pan, and stir to coat the rice with the spice mixture.
Add 2 cups of water to the pan, and bring to a boil.
Reduce the heat to low, cover the pan, and simmer for 20 minutes, until the rice is cooked and the liquid has been absorbed.
Fluff the paella with a fork to separate the grains, and serve hot.
